zh.lifeSummary: 當John de Bulmer IV於大約1245年出生在英國越可爾維爾頓時，他的父親John de Bulmer75歲，母親Alice Topcliffe31歲。他於1269年4月26日之前與Theophania de Morewick結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1299年2月17日在他的家鄉享年55歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John de Bulmer IV于大约1245年出生在英国越可爾維爾頓时，他的父亲John de Bulmer75岁，母亲Alice Topcliffe31岁。他于1269年4月26日之前与Theophania de Morewick结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1299年2月17日在他的家乡享年55岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bulmer
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Yorkshire and Durham): habitational name from either of two places called Bulmer, in the North Yorkshire and Essex, or from Boulmer in Northumberland. The Yorkshire place, recorded in Domesday Book as Bolemere, is named in Old English with bula ‘bull’ + mere ‘lake’, as is Boulmer; the Essex placename, found in early records as Bulenemera, is from bulena (genitive plural of bula) + mere ‘lake’.

variants.name: Bolmer
meanings: Dutch: probably from the ancient Germanic personal name Baldemar, composed of the elements bald ‘bold’ + mar ‘famous’.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When John de Bulmer IV was born about 1245, in Wilton, Yorkshire, England, his father, John de Bulmer, was 75 and his mother, Alice Topcliffe, was 31. He married Theophania de Morewick before 26 April 1269. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 17 February 1299, in his hometown, at the age of 55.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John de Bulmer IV est né environ 1245, à Wilton, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, John de Bulmer, avait 75 ans et sa mère, Alice Topcliffe, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Theophania de Morewick avant 26 avril 1269. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 17 février 1299, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 55 ans.

de.Bulmer, Yorkshire, England: Bulmer, North Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als John de Bulmer IV um 1245 in Wilton, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John de Bulmer 75 und seine Mutter Alice Topcliffe 31. Er hat vor 26. April 1269 Theophania de Morewick geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 17. Februar 1299 im Alter von 55 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John de Bulmer IV è nato il circa 1245 nel Wilton, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, John de Bulmer, aveva 75 anni e il suo madre, Alice Topcliffe, aveva 31 anni. Lui sposato Theophania de Morewick prima del 26 aprile 1269. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 17 febbraio 1299, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 55 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John de Bulmer IVが約1245年にイギリスヨークシュアイアウィルトンで生まれた時，父John de Bulmerは75歳，母Alice Topcliffeは31歳であった。1269年4月26日以前にTheophania de Morewickと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1299年2月17日に故郷で55歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John de Bulmer IV(이)가 대략 1245년 영국 요르크실르 윌턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John de Bulmer(은)는 75세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Topcliffe(은)는 31세였다. 그는 1269년 4월 26일 이전 Theophania de Morewick(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1299년 2월 17일 그의 고향에서 55세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John de Bulmer IV nasceu aproximadamente 1245, em Wilton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John de Bulmer, tinha 75 anos e sua mãe, Alice Topcliffe, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Theophania de Morewick antes 26 de abril de 1269. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 17 de fevereiro de 1299, em sua cidade natal, com 55 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John de Bulmer IV родился около 1245 г. в местности уилтон, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени John de Bulmer было 75 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Topcliffe, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Theophania de Morewick перед 26 апрель 1269 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 17 февраля 1299 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 55 лет.

Se casó con Theophania de Morewick antes de 26 de abril de 1269. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 17 de febrero de 1299, en su pueblo, a la edad de 55 años.
